channel.title: Morgan-Stanley on Archive 03
channel.description: Recent content in Morgan-Stanley on Archive 03

item.title: Has the U.S. Stock Market Bottomed Out? Wall Street's Growing 'Bottom Is In' Sentiment
item.description: As the U.S. stock market undergoes short-term corrections, Wall Street heavyweights are declaring that the ‘bottom is in,’ injecting a sense of anticipation. From Ed Yardeni’s appearance on CNBC on April 2nd to the starkly contrasting outlooks of Morgan Stanley and Bank of America (BoA)—is now the time to buy, or is this a trap set by a temporary bounce?
